---
title: ""
author: ""
date: ""
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    number_sections: true
  pdf_document:
    toc: false
    number_sections: true
fontsize: 12pt
geometry: margin=2.5cm
---

```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
if (knitr::is_latex_output()) {

  cat("
\\thispagestyle{empty}

\\begin{center}

\\vspace*{2cm}

{\\Large \\textbf{ANÁLISE DE INDICADORES SOCIOECONÔMICOS DO BRASIL - API IBGE}}

\\vspace{0.5cm}

{\\large Carlos da Costa}

\\vspace{0.5cm}

{\\large \\today}

\\vspace{2cm}

\\includegraphics[width=0.7\\textwidth]{ibge.jpg}

\\vfill

Recife - PE

\\end{center}

\\newpage
")

} else {

  cat("
<div style='text-align:center; margin-top:100px;'>

<h1>ANÁLISE DE INDICADORES SOCIOECONÔMICOS DO BRASIL - API IBGE</h1>

<h3>Carlos da Costa</h3>

<h4>", Sys.Date(), "</h4>

<br><br>

<img src='ibge.jpg' width='50%'>

<br><br><br>

<p>Recife - PE</p>

</div>

<div style='page-break-after: always;'></div>
")

}
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)  

# --------------------------------------------------------
# Pacotes utilizados
# --------------------------------------------------------
library(yaml)
library(here)

# --------------------------------------------------------
# Leitura de arquivos de configuração
# --------------------------------------------------------
# paths.yaml: define caminhos de arquivos e diretórios
# config_env.yaml: parâmetros de ambiente (retry, etc.)
# suppressWarnings evita poluição de logs por warnings não críticos
# --------------------------------------------------------
config_paths <- suppressWarnings(
  yaml::read_yaml(here("config_yaml", "paths.yaml"))
)
config_retry <- suppressWarnings(
  yaml::read_yaml(here("config_yaml", "config_env.yaml"))
)

source(here("main.R"))

result <- main()
```
